items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 就美国政府出口管制指令发布声明，全面暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的访问。差异点：与 6 月 9 日正常 GA 发布相比，模型从可用状态被强制下架；强制的日志保留要求影响其与 Microsoft 等合作伙伴的部署。已调用相关模型的生产系统需立即切走。
items.backend_focus: 跟进报道：已升级为出口管制层面的硬性中断。将所有调用 model=claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的代码切回 Claude Opus 4.5 或 Sonnet 系列；正在使用 Microsoft Azure 上 Fable 5 端点的需关注渠道侧迁移公告。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 国家级青年 fellowship 项目，面向早期职业人员推广 AI 社区服务。属人才/公益类项目公告，无 API、模型、定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是招聘/公益类公告，与工程无关。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业 AI 安全/部署研究项目的扩容公告，不涉及 API 能力或模型版本变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是研究项目扩容公告，与工程无关。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，定位为 Opus 系列升级，在 coding、agentic tasks 和专业工作上更强，原文摘要被首页其他公告截断。关键差异点：相较 Claude Opus 4.5 在编码与长程 agent 任务上能力提升。需关注 context window、max_tokens、tool use 是否同步调整。
items.backend_focus: API 调用方：将 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-5 切到 claude-opus-4-8 后重测编码与 agent 工作流；留意官方 pricing 页是否同步更新 Opus 4.8 的输入/输出单价与 rate limit。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 开设首尔办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项新合作。属区域扩张与商务合作公告，无 API 区域可用性新增或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是区域办公室与商务合作公告，与工程无关；不改变 API 端点、模型版本或限流。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 公布首期 Anthropic Public Record 的结果，属于透明度报告。差异点：对外披露其使用政策、申诉与执法数据。无 API 行为或模型变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是透明度/合规报告，与工程无关。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。属商务合作公告，未公布新的行业专用模型或合规认证 API。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是商务合作公告，与工程无关；不直接产生 API 改动。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成到银行、航空等受监管行业的核心系统中。属商务合作公告，无新 API/SDK 字段。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是商务合作公告，与工程无关。
